name: claude-statusbar
description: Lightweight Claude Code status-line monitor with switchable styles, themes, slash commands, and a local AgentParty bridge for Codex workflows. v3.28.2 fixes `cs upgrade` channel detection for uv-tool Python symlinks; v3.28.1 added `cs upgrade` plus -v/-V/-version aliases. Claude Code remains the full native statusLine data source for quota/session fields; Codex support is the local AgentParty presence bridge and never calls AgentParty, reads tokens, or makes network requests. Requires the cs CLI from PyPI (pip install claude-statusbar or uv tool install claude-statusbar).
